name: HWR_DI_OBJ_ATTRIBUTE_VL
query: SELECT B.ID, B.REF_ID, B.SOURCE_ID, B.ATTRIBUTE_ID, T.LABEL, T.DESCRIPTION, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_DI_OBJ_ATTRIBUTE_B B, HWR_DI_OBJ_ATTRIBUTE_TL T WHERE B.ID = T.ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
